"I Once Was Lost, But Now I'm Found"
"For this son of mine was dead and is alive again;
he was lost and is found."
Luke 15:24 Jody & Hannah Northern Ireland
140
men in basketball outreach
1
soul found in the hospice
7+
nationalities at Taste of Home
⛹
Basketball Tournament Outreach
140 men · weekly gospel sharing · parables of the lost
Pre-game devotions
Game action
Champions!
🙏 Pray
Jody shared the gospel before every game — focusing on the parables of the lost coin, lost sheep, and lost son. Many prioritise religion and listen respectfully, but do not yet know our Saviour personally.

Pray that those who are lost will soon be found.
✞
Pray for Jeff
Grade 4 cancer · palliative care · hospice patient
Jody visiting Jeff
Basketball guys visit
🎉
Jody led Jeff to Christ last week!
Jeff was diagnosed in January with grade 4 cancer. His wife is now by his side — but his 3 children remain in the Philippines. Praise God for His salvation!
🙏 Pray
For Jeff's peace and comfort in his final days. For his wife by his side. For his three children far away in the Philippines. That his assurance in Christ would be a light to all who visit.
🌍
A Taste of Home — International Night
Mission week · music, food & gospel conversations
Jody speaking
Congregation
Worship team
🙏 Pray
Ukrainians, Chinese, Filipinos, Polish, Americans, Africans and locals all gathered. The message: despite being far from physical home, you can have a home in Christ — He is the anchor for whatever life throws at you.

Pray for all who attended and Filipino families invited to the family fun day.
⚠
Reaching Filipinos in MCGI & INC
Cults that tie salvation to church membership
Jody with Richard — gospel conversations over coffee
🙏 Pray
Many Filipinos we meet are deeply connected to MCGI and Iglesia ni Cristo — both teach salvation through strict church membership. They are so indoctrinated they are fearful to consider anything else.

Pray for Richard, who has stepped away from Christianity. Basketball ministry is a vital bridge to reach these hearts with the true gospel.
🤝
Building Connections
Youth groups · Antrim · Brookside Filipino fellowship
Antrim fellowship meal
Brookside youth group
🙏 Pray
A local youth group who have prayed for this ministry for a year were encouraged in their own faith-sharing walk. Jody spoke at Antrim men's breakfast and Brookside Filipino fellowship.

Pray for deeper connections with churches across the area.
👩
Hannah & the Filipino Mums
Easter meetups · new babies · seeking community
Hannah with Filipino mums & little ones
🙏 Pray
More regular meetups over Easter — many mums are seeking friendship and community. Pray for opportunities to take these friendships deeper at exactly the right time.

Pray also for new mums with all the joys and adjustments of new babies arriving!
🌳
Parks, Podcasts & Family
Beyond Sunday · OFW outreach · spring friendships
Family at the park
Beyond Sunday podcast
Filipino community — planning a weekend away!
🙏 Pray
Beyond Sunday podcast is reaching thousands of Overseas Filipino Workers through Facebook and social media daily.

The family is spending spring at parks making new friendships. Pray for wisdom in every connection — we trust God can use the little we have to bring Him glory.

Also pray for the Filipino weekend away (delayed for better weather!) and a restful family holiday at end of May.
Thank you for keeping us in your prayers
